reason: HE fuse armed and detonated because projected armor resistance 32 mm met fuse sensitivity 18 mm
notes: Projected armor resistance for the fuse check: 32 mm.
Fuse status: armed. projected armor resistance 32 mm met fuse sensitivity 18 mm
Generated 10 HE fragments from a shallow blast origin.
Spread heuristic: HE uses a wider cone and higher local jitter than AP; authored randomness 0.1 further opens the cone.
Energy heuristic: Explosive mass 1.85 kg scales both fragment count and local fragment energy, with blast fragments weaker than AP core fragments.
Reach heuristic: HE fragments are intentionally short-lived (roughly 0.9-2.1 m) so damage clusters near the blast origin instead of traveling deep like AP spall.
Continuation heuristic: HE fragments do not continue after a major interaction in the prototype; damage is front-loaded near the detonation point.
